ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the employee */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "leave_balance" TEXT /* Current leave balance of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager oversees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_types" (
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave type */,
  "leave_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the leave type (e.g., Casual Leave, Medical Leave) */,
  "max_leave_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for this leave type */,
  "carry_forward" INTEGER /* Whether leave days can be carried forward to the next year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee making the leave request */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of leave requested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "no_of_days" TEXT /* Number of days requested */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who approved or declined the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "rejected_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejecting the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES leave_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., New, Approved, Declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related leave request */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave history record */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated leave request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of leave requested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "no_of_days" TEXT /* Number of days taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Final status of the leave request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_history_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES leave_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave policy */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the policy applies to */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of leave the policy governs */,
  "max_leave_days" INTEGER /* Maximum number of days allowed for this leave type in this department */,
  "carry_forward" INTEGER /* Whether leave days can be carried forward to the next year in this department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_policies_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_approval_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave approval workflow */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of leave the workflow governs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the workflow applies to */,
  "approver_level_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first-level approver */,
  "approver_level_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second-level approver (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_approval_workflow_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_balance_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave balance log entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of leave */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the balance was updated */,
  "new_balance" TEXT /* New leave balance after the update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the balance update (e.g., leave taken, carried forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balance_log_leave_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("leave_type_id") REFERENCES leave_types ("leave_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_balance_log_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
